I am an NLP chatbot built with Python, NLTK and Flask!
I'm your AI assistant powered by NLP. Ask me anything!
I was just recently built using Python and NLP!
Age doesn't apply to me — I'm a bot!
I was built by a Python developer using NLTK and Flask!
My creator used Python, NLTK, and scikit-learn to bring me to life!
AI stands for Artificial Intelligence — it enables machines to simulate human thinking.
Artificial Intelligence is the ability of machines to perform tasks that typically require human intelligence.
NLP stands for Natural Language Processing — it helps computers understand and interpret human language.
Natural Language Processing is a branch of AI focused on the interaction between computers and human language.
Machine Learning is a subset of AI where systems learn from data to improve over time without being explicitly programmed.
ML allows computers to learn patterns from data and make decisions automatically.
Python is a high-level, easy-to-learn programming language widely used in AI, web development, and data science.
Python is popular for its simple syntax and powerful libraries like NLTK, Flask, and scikit-learn.
Flask is a lightweight Python web framework used to build web applications and REST APIs.
Flask is minimal and flexible — perfect for building web backends quickly in Python.
Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs! 😄
I told a joke about UDP once... I'm not sure if you got it. 😂
Why was the JavaScript developer sad? Because he didn't Node how to Express himself! 😆
